Ruling:
Hearing held on Defendant Grill Concepts, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Requested In Deposition Notice: Motion is Granted as journal ordered produced for in camera review - Review conducted - pages 18 and 26 ordered produced in their entirety.
